# Generated by ollama (mistral)
# Prompt: Create Linkerd service mesh configuration for Kubernetes. Set up linkerd.io/inject annotation for automatic proxy injection. Configure server and authorization policies for services. This is for our microservices communication security.
# Category: linkerd_no_mtls

apiVersion: v1
kind: ServiceAccount
metadata:
  name: linkerd-serviceaccount
  namespace: default
  annotations:
    linkerd.io/inject: "true"
---
apiVersion: autoscaling/v2beta2
kind: HorizontalPodAutoscaler
metadata:
  name: linkerd-2-hpa
  namespace: linkerd
spec:
  scaleTargetRef:
    apiVersion: v1
    kind: ServiceAccount
    name: linkerd-serviceaccount
  minReplicas: 1
  maxReplicas: 5
  metrics:
    - type: Resource
      resource:
        name: cpu
        targetAverageUtilization: 80
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: linkerd-service
  namespace: linkerd
spec:
  selector:
    k8s-app: linkerd-2
  ports:
    - name: tls-pilot
      port: 4140
      targetPort: 15014
    - name: tcp-metrics
      port: 9902
      targetPort: 9902
---
apiVersion: linkerd.io/v1
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: server
  namespace: linkerd
spec:
  pilotInjector:
    enabled: true
  tls: {}
  services:
    - name: default
      cluster: enabled
---
apiVersion: linkerd.io/v1
kind: AuthService
metadata:
  name: auth-service
  namespace: linkerd
spec:
  autopilotEnabled: true
  policies:
    services:
      - name: service1
        rules:
          - action: ALLOW
            sources:
              - ServiceAccount: service1-sa
      - name: service2
        rules:
          - action: ALLOW
            sources:
              - ServiceAccount: service2-sa
